scripts.build:ios: node ../../tools/game-env/validate.mjs --game find_the_dog --mode ios && vite build --mode ios
scripts.build:android: node ../../tools/game-env/validate.mjs --game find_the_dog --mode android && vite build --mode android
scripts.ios:sync: cap sync ios && node ../../tools/native-shell/apply.mjs --game find_the_dog && node ../../tools/native-shell/validate.mjs --game find_the_dog
